summary: Tested ghost-agent cleanup, sys-metrics endpoints, /server-metrics page, SettingsPage GhostAgentsPanel, AgentUpgradeBanner, removal of /connectors UI, and legacy /api/connector/status reachability. 14/14 backend pytest cases pass; frontend Playwright run confirms all required UI elements/testids render correctly with proper empty/populated states.

issues: Navigating to /connectors renders an empty layout body (no catch-all NotFound route under the protected `/` parent). Acceptable per current SPA pattern but consider adding a generic 404 page for removed routes.

action_items: Optional: add a catch-all `<Route path='*' element={<NotFound />} />` so removed pages like /connectors don't render a blank screen.
Optional: surface 'last_heartbeat_at' column in the GhostAgentsPanel table — currently only hostname/client/version/age are shown, but the API returns last_heartbeat_at which is useful context.
critical_code_review_comments: `_bridge_sys_metrics` always writes to `sys_metrics_history` without TTL field — relies on a `received_at`/`sampled_at` index w/ expireAfterSeconds defined in server.py startup; if that index is missing, the collection can grow unbounded. Worth double-checking startup logs on prod.

`agents_cleanup` allows `agent_ids: []` (empty list) silently returning deleted_count=0 — fine, but the 400-vs-200 boundary differs from `cleanup_all_stale: false + no ids` (which 400s). Slight inconsistency.
`sys_metrics_overview` returns up to 500 docs without pagination; OK at current scale but flag for >500-agent tenants.
`/api/agents/stale` iterates *all* managed_agents docs in Python (no Mongo $expr filter). Acceptable today, but for 10k+ rows consider pushing the staleness filter into the aggregation pipeline.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests insert/cleanup TEST_-prefixed docs into managed_agents and sys_metrics_latest; all are removed in fixture teardown. agent_cleanup_audit gains audit rows that are intentionally retained.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend module test_ghost_agents_sysmetrics.py is a regression suite for the ghost-cleanup + sys-metrics feature. The /server-metrics page testids are: server-metrics-page, server-metrics-refresh, server-metrics-filter, server-card-{agent_id}. SettingsPage testid: ghost-agents-panel. The Go agent does not run inside this Linux container (Windows-only), so sys_metrics_latest is normally empty unless seeded directly in Mongo.
